# plot_ortho { #neuroim.plot_ortho }

```python
plot_ortho(
    vol,
    coords=None,
    title=None,
    cmap="gray",
    figsize=(12, 4),
    axes=None,
    *,
    coord_space="voxel",
    unit=None,
    range="robust",
    probs=(0.02, 0.98),
    crosshair=False,
    colorbar=False,
)
```

Display axial, sagittal, and coronal slices at a voxel or world coordinate.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name | Type | Description | Default |
|------|------|-------------|---------|
| vol | NeuroVol or array-like | 3D volume. ``NeuroVol`` inputs use spatial orientation and world extents. | _required_ |
| coords | tuple | Length-3 voxel/index or world/mm coordinate. Defaults to the volume center. | ``None`` |
| title | str | Figure title. | ``None`` |
| cmap | str, sequence, or Colormap | Matplotlib colormap or neuroim alias. | ``"gray"`` |
| figsize | tuple | Figure size in inches when ``axes`` is not supplied. | ``(12, 4)`` |
| axes | array-like of Axes | Three existing axes to draw into. | ``None`` |
| coord_space, unit | str | ``"voxel"``/``"index"`` or ``"world"``/``"mm"``. ``unit`` is a compatibility alias. | ``"voxel"`` |
| range | str or tuple | Display range: ``"robust"``, ``"data"``, or explicit ``(lo, hi)``. | ``"robust"`` |
| probs | tuple | Quantiles used for robust ranges. | ``(0.02, 0.98)`` |
| crosshair | bool | Draw crosshair lines at the selected coordinate. | ``False`` |
| colorbar | bool | Draw a shared colorbar. | ``False`` |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
|  | (fig, axes) tuple | Matplotlib Figure and the three displayed Axes. |
